description: A QA analyst is investigating intermittent Git checkout failures in Jenkins pipelines. Create a custom log recorder named 'git-debug-recorder' to capture targeted diagnostic logs. Configure the recorder with the following loggers: 'hudson.plugins.git' at level FINE, 'org.jenkinsci.plugins.gitclient' at level FINE, and 'com.cloudbees.plugins.credentials' at level WARNING. You are already logged in as admin. If prompted, use Username: admin, Password: Admin123!
